'''Soy Milk''' is a food item that gives you 3 hunger points.

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Soy milk.png
| id = soy_milk
| type = Food
| Subtype = Soy
| Properties = Hunger points: 3/10
| stackable = 64
}}

Your dog can also drink this, so don't be shy to share it with your furry pal!
==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|[[Dried Soy Beans]]+ Bowl
|[[File:Soy milk crafting.png|336x336px]]
|}
==Used In==
*[[Tofu]]
==Usage==
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0
